notes: Assertion on response.status_code was inverted (expected 200 but checked != 200).
Test fixture loaded a stale auth token from a sibling test, causing assertion to drift.
Hard-coded sleep(2) is too short on slow CI runners; should use a wait-for-element helper.
Test compared bytes after .lower() of a multi-byte unicode string; expected value was wrong.
Mock payment gateway response was missing the 'refund_id' field the test asserted on.
Test assumed deterministic ordering without an ORDER BY clause; flaky on Postgres.
Server returns 500 on a valid request body; null-pointer in OrderService.computeTax().
Allows two users to register with the same email; missing unique constraint or check.
Chart component throws 'cannot read property length of undefined' when timeseries is empty.
Export endpoint returns latin-1 encoded bytes; client receives mojibake for cyrillic names.
Rate limiter does not return 429 — instead returns 500 once the counter wraps.
Reset email contains the raw token in the URL fragment instead of a query param; broken in some clients.
DNS lookup for the staging hostname failed with NXDOMAIN; staging was being redeployed.
MinIO container OOM-killed mid-test; build runner had only 2GB allocated.
Postgres rejected connections with 'too many clients already'; pool size in CI was too small.
Chromium failed to launch with 'No usable sandbox' — kernel update on the CI runner.
ts_rank ties resolved by row id; passes on retry. Recent history shows 8/10 pass.
Race between connect() and the first send(); 1 in 4 runs misses the first frame.
Polls for a job for 500ms; sometimes the consumer takes 600ms to spin up.
Headless Chrome occasionally misses the Escape keypress; not reproducible locally.
